problem_statement: ReadOnlyWorkerRuntimeDispatchAdmissionWitness and ReadOnlyWorkerActiveRuntimeLeaseAdmissionWitness define upstream dispatch and lease gates, but Universal Action Orchestration dispatch authorization still needs a schema-backed witness before any runtime worker dispatch can be enabled.
success_criteria: ReadOnlyWorkerUaoDispatchAuthorizationWitness validates against a JSON schema and Foundation Mode example
the witness binds the upstream runtime dispatch admission witness and active runtime lease admission witness

the witness requires UAO request evidence, effect-bearing classification, no-bypass proof, policy allow decision, tenant actor worker scope binding, active runtime lease admission, runtime dispatch admission boundary, Phi_gov authorization, trusted runtime clock, WorkerFailureReceipt obligation, and effect reconciliation

the witness keeps UAO dispatch authorization, Phi_gov dispatch authorization, runtime dispatch admission, runtime dispatch, worker invocation, receipt emission, receipt append, filesystem writes, connector calls, success claims, and terminal closure denied
focused tests reject authority drift, contract drift, missing authorization input refs, admission drift, malformed payloads, and summary drift
non_goals: do not perform UAO dispatch authorization
do not perform Phi_gov dispatch authorization
do not emit or append runtime receipts
do not grant filesystem, connector, network, terminal closure, or success-claim authority
constraints: Foundation Mode remains local-first and witness-only
runtime dispatch remains blocked until UAO authorization, Phi_gov authorization, active runtime lease admission, WorkerFailureReceipt, and effect reconciliation evidence exist
all new artifacts must remain deterministic and read-only
evidence_required: upstream runtime dispatch admission witness validation
upstream active runtime lease admission witness validation
